mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID , eim.ETNM AS RQST_BPLC_NM , tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM , tbiar.RGSN_TS
FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiar LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID ) tbias_end ON tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
WHERE 1=1 AND (tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{AUDIT_EVALUATE_CODE} OR tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{AUDIT_COMPLETE_CODE})
ORDER BY tbiar.RGSN_TS DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM < 50

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tbias.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , tbias.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , tbias.RGSN_USER_ID , tbias.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R tbias LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiar ON tbias.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID WHERE tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID = #{invmCmpId} AND tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID = #{rqstEnprId} ORDER BY tbias.RGSN_TS DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tbiqm.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , tbiqm.INVM_CMP_ID , tbiqm.RQST_ENPR_ID , tbiqm.RGSN_TS AS INVM_STTG_DT
, tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiqm LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MIN(RGSN_TS) AS START_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.START_TS ) tbias_start ON tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiqm.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L tbivcl ON tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiqm.INVM_CMP_ID WHERE tbiqm.RQST_ENPR_ID = #{rqstEnprId} AND tbiqm.INVM_CMP_ID = #{invmCmpId} AND tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{AUDIT_REQUEST_CODE}
AND ( CASE WHEN tbivcl.INVMEXNT_RAP_LMTN_MNCT IS NULL THEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -tbivcl.INVMEXNT_RAP_LMTN_MNCT), 'YYYYMMDD') END ) < TO_CHAR(tbiqm.RGSN_TS, 'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY tbiqm.RGSN_TS DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT epr.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , epr.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM , epr.RGSN_USER_ID , epr.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R epr LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON epr.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = ccd.COM_CD_ID WHERE epr.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = #{invmExntRqstId} ORDER BY epr.RGSN_TS ASC

SELECT tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
, tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID , tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID , eim_vc.ETNM AS INVM_CMP_BPLC_NM , eim_com.ETNM AS RQST_BPLC_NM
, eim_vc.BZN AS INVM_CMP_BIZRNO , eim_com.BZN AS RQST_BPLC_BIZRNO
, tbiar.ANNC_DAT_FILE_ID , tbiar.ADDT_DOC_FILE_ID , annc_file.FILE_NM AS ANNC_DAT_FILE_NM , addt_file.FILE_NM AS ADDT_DOC_FILE_NM
, tbiar.PBRL_PICT_URL , tbiar.PRPL_MSG_CON , tbiar.RQST_MSG_CON , tbiar.EXNT_MSG_CON , tbiar.INQ_ABL_NDD
, tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM
, tbiar.RGSN_USER_ID , tbiar.RGSN_TS , tbiar.AMNN_USER_ID , tbiar.AMNN_TS
, vcl_vc.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , ccd_vc.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_CMP_PTRN_NM , eid_com.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD , ccd_com.COM_CD_NM AS ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_NM
, tbias_rqst.RGSN_TS AS INVM_RQST_DT
, tbiar.EXNT_RSLT_CD , ccd_rslt.COM_CD_NM AS EXNT_RSLT_NM , tbiar.EXNT_RSPR_ID , tbiar.INVM_PRFR_SCDL_AMT , tbiar.EXNT_RSLT_RMRK , tbiar.INVMCROF_REPNM
, tbiar.BRCD , tbiar.EMN , tbiar.EMM
, tbiar.TCB_TCHN_GRD , tbiar.INCF_CD1 , tbiar.INCF_CD2 , tbiar.INCF_CD3
, irbsin.EMP_CNT , eid_com.ENPR_INRD_CON , eim_com.INCR_YMD , irbsin.ADR , irbsin.HMPG_URL_ADR FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiar LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_vc ON eim_vc.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_com ON eim_com.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_BSIN_M irbsin ON irbsin.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M annc_file ON annc_file.FILE_ID = tbiar.ANNC_DAT_FILE_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M addt_file ON addt_file.FILE_ID = tbiar.ADDT_DOC_FILE_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vcl_vc ON tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID = vcl_vc.UTLINSTT_ID AND vcl_vc.UTLINSTT_ID IS NOT NULL
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_vc ON vcl_vc.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD = ccd_vc.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D eid_com ON eid_com.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_com ON eid_com.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD = ccd_com.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_rslt ON tbiar.EXNT_RSLT_CD = ccd_rslt.COM_CD_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID ) tbias_end ON tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R tbias_rqst ON tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbias_rqst.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND tbias_rqst.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{AUDIT_REQUEST_CODE}
WHERE tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = #{invmExntRqstId}

SELECT tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID , tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID , eim_vc.ETNM AS INVM_CMP_BPLC_NM , eim_com.ETNM AS RQST_BPLC_NM , eim_com.BZN AS BZN , tbiar.RGSN_TS AS INVM_STTG_DT , tbiar.BRCD , tbiar.EMN , tbiar.EMM
, tbiar.PRPL_MSG_CON , tbiar.RQST_MSG_CON
, tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM
, tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD AS START_INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD
, vcl_vc.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , ccd_vc.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_CMP_PTRN_NM , eid_com.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD , ccd_com.COM_CD_NM AS ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_NM
, bsin.ADR , bsin.HMPG_URL_ADR , bsin.TTIS_STCNT , bsin.EMP_CNT , bsin.COL , bsin.RPRNM , bsin.ZPCD , bsin.CPFN_AMT , bsin.PVPR_AMT , bsin.ETVL_AMT
, hope.INVM_HOPE_STG_NM , hope.INVM_HOPE_AMT_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiar LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D eid_com ON eid_com.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_com ON eid_com.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD = ccd_com.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID ) tbias_end ON tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MIN(RGSN_TS) AS START_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.START_TS
) tbias_start ON tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_vc ON eim_vc.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_com ON eim_com.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vcl_vc ON tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID = vcl_vc.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_vc ON vcl_vc.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD = ccd_vc.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_BSIN_M bsin ON tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID = bsin.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hoped.UTLINSTT_ID , hoped.INVM_STG_CD , hoped.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_HOPE_STG_NM , CC.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_HOPE_AMT_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D hoped INNER JOIN ( SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D GROUP BY UTLINSTT_ID ) B ON hoped.UTLINSTT_ID = B.UTLINSTT_ID AND hoped.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON hoped.INVM_STG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D CC ON hoped.INVM_AMT_CD = CC.COM_CD_ID ) hope ON hope.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID WHERE 1=1 AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD IN('EXN00000', 'EXN00001' , 'EXN00002' , 'EXN00003', 'EXN01000', 'EXN01001', 'EXN01002')
AND tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{listStartType}
AND tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID = #{utlinsttId}
AND tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID IN ('C0040865','C0127305')
AND tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID = #{utlinsttId}
AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{invmExntPgsgCd}
AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD != #{AUDIT_COMPLETE_CODE} AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD != #{AUDIT_EXPIRED_CODE} AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD != #{AUDIT_CANCEL_CODE}
AND UPPER(eim_com.ETNM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchComNm}) || '%'
AND UPPER(eim_com.BZN) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchBzn}) || '%'
AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(tbiar.RGSN_TS, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchFromDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchToDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY tbiar.RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID , tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID , tbiar.RGSN_TS AS INVM_STTG_DT , tbiar.PRPL_MSG_CON , tbiar.RQST_MSG_CON , tbiar.INVM_PRFR_SCDL_AMT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiar LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R rst_cd ON rst_cd.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON rst_cd.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID WHERE C.COM_CD_ID IN ('EXN00003') AND tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY tbiar.RGSN_TS DESC;
